name: cortex-plugin-chain-of-thought
description: Pluggable reasoning strategies (Chain-of-Thought, Tree-of-Thoughts, ReAct, Plan-and-Execute) that agents can dynamically select per-task for smarter problem-solving
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: reason
tools.description: Execute a reasoning strategy on a given problem. The strategy determines how the problem is decomposed and solved step-by-step.

params.name: problem
params.description: The problem or question to reason about

params.name: context
params.description: Optional context to include in reasoning (e.g., file contents, error messages)

tools.name: list_strategies
tools.description: List all available reasoning strategies with descriptions and best-use recommendations.

tools.name: select_strategy
tools.description: Auto-select the best reasoning strategy for a given task based on its characteristics (complexity, domain, required structure).

params.name: task_description
params.description: Description of the task to match a strategy for

params.name: task_type
params.description: Type of task to help strategy selection

tools.name: evaluate_reasoning
tools.description: Evaluate the quality of a reasoning trace — checks for logical gaps, unsupported claims, and overall coherence. Returns a score and improvement suggestions.

params.name: reasoning_trace
params.description: The full reasoning trace to evaluate

fields.label: Default Strategy
fields.description: Default reasoning strategy when none is specified

fields.label: Tree Breadth (ToT)
fields.description: Number of branches to explore per node in Tree-of-Thoughts

fields.label: ReAct Max Iterations
fields.description: Maximum thought-action-observation cycles for ReAct strategy

tools: Claude Code (Anthropic) — initial scaffold and implementation
